reason: Publish BatikCraft Studio 0.5.3: BatikBrew now detects the LoRA family from the .batikmodel manifest and safetensors header and runs Stable Diffusion 1.5 LoRAs on an SD 1.5 pipeline instead of forcing SDXL, fixing the 'unsupported operand type(s) for *: NoneType and int' failure, and reports LoRA/base-model mismatches before loading weights.
